_note: The featured 'pairing' module for Watches — category equivalent of Style's 'This Week's Fit.' Here it's 'The Starter Collection': the three-watch setup that covers a man's whole life. Items reference picks by slug. Writeups final, GuyTalk voice.

sets.title: The Three-Watch Rotation
sets.subtitle: Cover your whole life without spending Rolex money.
sets.writeup: You don't need a collection. You need three watches that cover everything: one nice automatic you'd be proud to wear to a wedding, one tough beater you never think about, and a strap swap that lets the nice one play dress-up or weekend. Start with the Hamilton Khaki Field as the one good watch — it goes with a suit or a t-shirt. Add a Casio as the gym-and-beach throwaway so you never risk the good one. Then a leather and a NATO strap turn the Hamilton into two more looks for twenty bucks. That's a complete watch life for well under seven hundred dollars, and it's a smarter setup than most guys with one flashy watch.

items.role: The one good watch — works with everything
The beater you never worry about
Strap swaps that turn one watch into three looks

sets.flashyCheck: The flex here is restraint — a thoughtful three-watch setup beats one loud status piece every time, and the people who matter know it.
